name: Forgotten Temple of the Deep
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>忘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>却</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>底</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>殿</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: While this card is on the field, this card's name becomes "Umi". Once per turn: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower Fish, Sea Serpent or Aqua-Type monster you control; banish that target. During your End Phase: Special Summon the monster(s) banished by this effect.
eff: While this card is on the field, this card's name becomes "Umi". Once per turn: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower Fish, Sea Serpent or Aqua-Type monster you control; banish that target. During your End Phase: Special Summon the monster(s) banished by this effect.

sets.set: Realm of the Sea Emperor Structure Deck

stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
